title: Lorain County, Ohio, Goes Live With Public Safety Offerings From Tyler Technologies and Emergency Networking
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that Lorain County, Ohio, has successfully gone live with public safety solutions from Tyler and Emergency Networking.

title: Nevada State Parks Goes Digital with New, Cloud-Based Reservation Software from Tyler Technologies
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that Nevada State Parks is modernizing with new cloud-based reservation software from Tyler.

title: Why Is Tyler Technologies (TYL) Down 2.3% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Tyler Technologies (TYL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Tyler Technologies Named an Esri Cornerstone Partner
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies was recognized as an Esri Cornerstone Partner for 20 years of commitment to Esri and ArcGIS technology.

title: 4 Stocks to Watch From the Promising Business-Software Services Industry
text: The Zacks Business-Software Services industry players like MSCI, TYL, SNX and PLUS are poised to benefit from the robust demand trend for multi-cloud-enabled software solutions.

title: Tyler (TYL) and Colorado SIPA Renew Payment Service Deal
text: Tyler (TYL) extends its 18-year relationship with Colorado SIPA, under which it will continue to provide more than 1,100 services and payment processing solutions to Colorado state government agencies.

title: Tyler Technologies Renews Contract for Digital Government and Payment Solutions in Colorado
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that the Colorado Statewide Internet Portal Authority signed a contract renewal for Tyler's digital government services.

title: Tyler (TYL) Strengthens Appraisal Services With Safeground Buyout
text: The buyout of Massachusetts-based analytics company, Safeground Analytics, is going to strengthen Tyler's (TYL) Property & Recording Division portfolio, bolstering its appraisal services capabilities.

title: Tyler Technologies Acquires Safeground Analytics
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies acquires Safeground Analytics, a company providing real estate appraisals and assessments for states, counties, and municipalities.

title: Tyler Technologies: Attractive On Its Margin Pivot Catalyst
text: Tyler Technologies continues to be a market leader with multiple acquisition catalysts, which positions it well to capitalize on opportunities arising from the favorable global government IT spending. It has also been successful in securing new contracts and maintains an outstanding gross retention rate.
